case_title: SETTLES, GENE vs. OTHMAN, WALID et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OTHMAN, WALID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 973 HAIGHT STREET, APT. 1, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,759.98 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,759.98, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
